authoring.note: COST COLUMNS ARE VOID for this run: token counts are 0 because authoring was not billed through the claude CLI. The F5.2 cost-per-certified-statement headline therefore stays DEFERRED (X15); the COVERAGE headline (>=30/40) is discharged at 37/40, with the 3 misses exactly the manifest non-transcribables.
